hits.title: Protein S as a therapeutic target.
hits.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH

text:
The provided literature search results for the query "protein" do not contain papers specifically related to the Breast cancer type 1 susceptibility protein (BRCA1).

The search returned five papers primarily focused on **Protein S**, including its role in COVID-19 [PMID:36494145], its anticoagulant functions [PMID:32702208], deficiency [PMID:9198178], therapeutic potential [PMID:41197807], and prevention of thrombosis [PMID:30683834]. Because the search query used was the generic term "protein" rather than the specific accession (P38398) or name (BRCA1), the evidence does not specify papers for the requested protein.

### Evidence
